intentSynonyms: look up recent orders in chipotle
fetch a single recent orders in chipotle
view one specific recent orders in chipotle
get recent order history with meal details in chipotle
description: Get the authenticated user's recent Chipotle orders with meal details, reorder availability, and order dates. Optionally filter by restaurant ID.

total_records.description: Maximum number of orders to return (default 5)
